title: phacelia dubia var. gilioides
intro: Phacelia dubia var. gilioides, also known as Phacelia gilioides, is a perennial herb species native to North America, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phacelia gilioides include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phacelia gilioides can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
